listings.title: HTR Black Hills
listings.condition_hint: Extensive recent capital improvements; over $1.8M in upgrades over four years
listings.description: 120-Site RV Park, Glamping and Cabin Resort in the Black Hills of South Dakota. Investment highlights include: central positioning near Mount Rushmore and national/state parks; proximity to the Sturgis Motorcycle Rally (15 million visitors, $2 billion economic impact); over $1.8 million in capital improvements over four years including cabin upgrades, expanded septic system adding 10 sites, 11 new glamping tents, and electricity upgrades to 25 RV sites; large, well-spaced wooded sites with extensive tree cover; expansion potential for additional sites, park models, cabins, food & beverage offerings using existing commercial kitchen infrastructure.
listings.property_type: RV Park, Glamping and Cabin Resort

listings.title: Royal Gorge / Cañon City KOA Holiday
listings.revenue_hint: 30+ years of operational success; income from RV sites, tent camping, Kamping Kottages, park models, store income, and rental agreements with commercial rafting company and residential tenant
listings.description: Proven 19.17-Acre, 121-Site KOA Holiday in Cañon City, CO, with 30+ Years of Operational Success, Extensive Amenities, and Direct Access to Royal Gorge. The property operates as an established campground with over 30 years of continuous operation. Income derives from RV sites, tent camping, Kamping Kottages, park models, store income, and rental agreements with a commercial rafting company and residential tenant. On-site amenities include a pool, mini-golf, giant slide, playgrounds, pizza kitchen, pancake house, and Old West town buildings. Located minutes from Royal Gorge Bridge & Park (350,000+ annual visitors). The KOA franchise agreement expires July 2026. The site is positioned approximately 1 hour from Colorado Springs, 2.25 hours from Denver, and provides access to rafting, fly fishing, and 50+ miles of biking/hiking trails.

listings.title: Quail Valley Recreational Village
listings.revenue_hint: Stable cash flow; strong demand for both short- and long-term guests; strong demand for affordable housing
listings.description: A 103-Site RV Park on ±29.14 Acres, Situated Just South of Sequoia National Park. Strong demand for both short- and long-term guests. Stable cash flow. Strong demand for affordable housing.

listings.title: ReTreet & The Farm at Baker Mountain
listings.revenue_hint: Stabilized glamping cash flow; strong ADR, occupancy, and direct bookings; diversified revenue through lodging, spa, events, retail, and guest services
listings.description: Scalable Outdoor Hospitality Platform: Luxury Glamping & High-Growth RV Development. An integrated platform leveraging stabilized glamping cash flow while unlocking high-growth RV market access through new development. ReTreet operates with strong ADR, occupancy, and direct bookings, generating diversified revenue through lodging, spa, events, retail, and guest services. The Farm component introduces expansion capacity with scalable infrastructure. The offering emphasizes Complementary Demand Segments: Luxury experiential stays and traditional RV travel, plus Operational Synergies: Shared branding, management, and close proximity. Strategic advantages include positioning near Lake Guntersville with access to key regional demand drivers and potential for institutional portfolio scaling.
listings.property_type: Outdoor Hospitality Platform (Luxury Glamping + RV Development)

listings.title: Oklahoma RV Resort Portfolio
listings.revenue_hint: Multiple ancillary revenue streams from retail/vending, propane, RV repair, premium site types, cabins, and guest services; Ardmore Lakes focuses on monthly occupancy for steady income
listings.description: Two-asset RV portfolio combining stable cash flow with experiential upside. Diversified portfolio across two established Oklahoma destinations. Ardmore Lakes focuses on monthly occupancy for steady income, while Arbuckle draws transient and seasonal demand. Both properties feature amenity-rich, resort-style assets including pools, waterslides, fishing lakes and ponds, clubhouse, fitness center, zipline, ninja course, and mining sluice. Multiple ancillary revenue streams from retail/vending, propane, RV repair, premium site types, cabins, and guest services. Both parks currently priced at the top of their local markets with opportunities to improve occupancy, dynamic pricing, and ancillary monetization. Expansion potential for approximately 25 additional sites. Near major outdoor recreation hubs with easy access via I-35 and regional highways.

listings.title: Fishers Peak RV Development
listings.condition_hint: Near-fully entitled for approximately 60 RV sites without rezoning; expandable to 75-80+ units; planning and entitlement clarity position property as hospitality-ready land
listings.description: ±83 acre, 60 to 80-unit outdoor hospitality / agritourism development in the Blue Ridge Mountains with a distinctive yet flexible design concept. Near-fully entitled for approximately 60 RV sites without rezoning requirements; expandable to 75–80+ units. 83 contiguous acres enabling phased development and future lodging concepts. Planning and entitlement clarity position property as hospitality-ready land. Strategic proximity to I-77 corridor and Blue Ridge foothills. Flexible development concept featuring NYC-inspired layout reflecting property's Manhattan-like shape.

listings.title: Crater Lake Resort
listings.condition_hint: Established in the 1980s; new Starlink Wi-Fi added in 2025; dedicated and loyal customer base
listings.description: Highly Profitable, High-Occupancy Resort and RV Park 9 Miles from Crater Lake National Park. Features generously sized, well-spaced sites designed to accommodate large RVs, upscale glamping tents, standard RV sites, a variety of charming cabins, and a spacious vacation home. Harrison Hall event center for weddings and gatherings. On-site hiking trail, cozy campfires, pickleball courts, and a family-friendly playground. Fort Creek flows through the resort for fishing, swimming, and canoeing. Established in the 1980s with dedicated and loyal customer base. New Starlink Wi-Fi added in 2025. Value-add opportunity: Remove 4 tent sites and add 8 Glamping Tents.

listings.title: Indiana Dunes RV Resort Development
listings.condition_hint: Fully entitled; site plans, utilities, and grading completed—minimizing entitlement risk; Planned Unit Development zoning
listings.description: Fully entitled RV resort development adjacent to Indiana Dunes National Park. Approved for 180+ RV sites and 15 park model cottages. Site plans, utilities, and grading completed—minimizing entitlement risk through existing Planned Unit Development zoning. Very limited RV campground inventory in close proximity to Indiana Dunes National and State Parks. Existing public campgrounds operate at or near full capacity during peak seasons. Indiana Dunes National Park (~3M annual visitors). Under 1 hour to Chicago; access to 30M+ people within a 3-hour drive. Development includes clubhouse, pool & splash pad, pickleball, mini-golf, dog park, and food truck area. Additional upside through retail or restaurant development and adaptive reuse potential for café, event space, or boutique retail offerings.

listings.title: The Oasis Manufactured Homes Development
listings.revenue_hint: Demand targeting $200K price or $1,500 monthly rental market; Air Force enlisted personnel receive $1,100+ monthly housing credit
listings.condition_hint: To be delivered with all permits and approvals
listings.description: A Development Project with Two 60-Acre Parcels with Site Plans for 325 Lots Each, on Full City Utilities, to be Delivered with All Permits and Approvals. All city utilities (water, sewer, trash). Proximity to military base (less than one mile from north end, 3 miles to east entrance). Demand targeting $200K price or $1,500 monthly rental market. No existing on-base housing with demand exceeding capacity. Competitive advantage over older, lower-quality mobile home parks with low vacancy. Estimated 60% of future residents would work at base or nearby construction. City growth trajectory toward south/southwest positioning property in development path. Air Force enlisted personnel receive $1,100+ monthly housing credit.

listings.title: Water's Edge RV and Cabin Resort
listings.revenue_hint: $645K or 68% of total revenue from recurring annual stay guests including leases, site fees, storage, HOA, and marina slips
listings.description: Waterfront property on Grand Lake featuring 96 full-hookup RV sites (20/30/50 Amp), 9 cabins, 20 marina slips (4 lifts) with direct main-body lake access, 101 covered storage stalls (±45,000 SF), plus additional outdoor storage acreage. The property sits on the main body of Grand Lake with private boat launch and marina infrastructure. Public utilities include water, sewer, and electric service. Established reservation system in place. The market area includes approximately 14 million people within 250 miles, with strong drive-to-market from Tulsa, NW Arkansas, and SW Missouri. $645K or 68% of total revenue comes from sources related to recurring annual stay guests including leases, site fees, storage, HOA, and marina slips.
listings.property_type: Waterfront RV Resort and Cabin Resort

listings.title: Cumberland RV Portfolio
listings.revenue_hint: Diversified revenue streams from seasonal/monthly stays plus transient RV travelers
listings.condition_hint: Stabilized and growth assets; some properties in operational ramp-up phases
listings.description: Portfolio of four RV and campground properties within the Lake Cumberland tourism corridor. Properties serve seasonal/monthly stays plus transient RV travelers, offering diversified revenue streams. Lake Cumberland is among the largest recreational lake systems in the eastern United States, attracting millions of annual visitors for boating, fishing, and recreation. Portfolio includes stabilized parks and properties in operational ramp-up phases. Management can be centralized across locations for shared staffing, maintenance, and marketing. Value-add opportunities exist for occupancy increases, rate optimization, site expansion, and amenity enhancement. Some properties offer additional site development potential.

listings.title: Carolina Rides RV Park Development
listings.condition_hint: Fully entitled; septic system installed and ready; roads and RV pads under construction
listings.description: Fully-entitled RV park development opportunity zone property with significant underground infrastructure completed. A professionally designed 137-space RV park has all site plans and permits finalized, including utilities and grading plans. Septic system installation is complete and ready for connection to individual sites. Planned amenities include a clubhouse with gym, swimming pool, dog parks, sports and pickleball courts, office space, and laundry facilities. Road construction and RV pad development are underway. Location benefits from accessibility off I-26 with estimated 59,900 daily vehicle passes. Surrounding 30-mile radius encompasses a population exceeding 800,000, including Columbia and rural communities. Major SCDOT reconstruction project of the I-26/I-95 interchange (2024-2032) anticipated to generate construction employment in the area.

listings.title: Deer Point Meadows – Pacific Northwest RV Portfolio Sale
listings.revenue_hint: Diversified revenue from long-term stays (7 assets) and short-term/transient operations (3 assets)
listings.condition_hint: Recent capital improvements completed across the portfolio
listings.description: 10-property portfolio spanning Oregon and Washington featuring over 1,090 rental units across 92+ acres. 890+ RV spaces plus 360+ additional units including cabins, lodges, park models, hotel rooms, boat slips, RV storage, and tent sites. Property sizes range from 80 to 140+ sites (110-unit average). Diversified revenue streams from long-term stays (7 assets) and short-term/transient-focused operations (3 assets). Eight properties connect to full municipal utilities. Recent capital improvements completed across the portfolio.

listings.title: The Yurtopian
listings.revenue_hint: Strong brand presence; approximately 67,000 monthly website visitors; over 64,000 Instagram followers; 95% direct bookings
listings.condition_hint: Completely turnkey with existing operational systems
listings.description: Two glamping properties under one brand in Texas Hill Country. The Dripping Springs location features potential for expansion, a wet-weather creek, recently built lodge and event space, and operates with 95% direct bookings targeting adults. Property development is unrestricted with minimal deed restrictions, no zoning, and falls outside the extraterritorial jurisdiction. Low property taxes apply due to wildlife exemption status. The Wimberley location includes six hand-painted Mongolian yurts, each featuring private rooftop decks, hot tubs, fire pits, full kitchenettes, and climate control. On-site amenities include spa services and picnic facilities. The business maintains strong brand presence with approximately 67,000 monthly website visitors and over 64,000 Instagram followers. Media features include Southern Living and Texas Bucket List coverage.

listings.title: Fountain Springs RV Development
listings.condition_hint: Shovel-ready; permitted and approved by all regulatory agencies; complete engineering finished; building permit in hand; multiple contractor bids obtained
listings.description: Completely shovel-ready 25-acre development designed for 160+ RV sites. Owners have secured bids from multiple contractors covering all construction phases. Engineering is complete with flexibility to adjust scope or reduce amenities. All regulatory agencies have approved the project. A building permit is in hand, enabling construction to commence immediately upon closing. The owners are open to remaining involved as partners, investors, or developers in a joint venture with the buyer.

listings.title: Cypress Landing RV Park & Lakeside Club
listings.revenue_hint: Event barn rentals, boat rentals, fuel dock sales, storage, general store income, RV rental income
listings.condition_hint: Minimal deferred maintenance; modern infrastructure developed in 2015
listings.description: Lakeside RV park featuring significant operational upside and expansion opportunities on Gantt Lake, Alabama. Excellent lakeside location with direct frontage on 2,700-acre Gantt Lake, minutes from Andalusia, AL. Expansion potential with ±20 undeveloped waterfront acres available for additional RV sites or alternative lodging concepts including long-term housing. Supported by lake recreation, seasonal tourism, and underserved long-term housing demand. Developed in 2015 with concrete pads, PVC utilities, county water, private septic, and minimal deferred maintenance. All 63 RV sites feature 20/30/50-amp service with pull-throughs. Two on-site cabins provide supplemental income; five tent sites included. Minimal historical owner involvement creates significant opportunities for pricing optimization, expanded marketing, and improved amenity utilization. Only fuel dock on Gantt Lake provides unique competitive advantage and incremental revenue source.

listings.title: Pisgah Falls Campground Development
listings.condition_hint: Shovel-ready; zoning, approvals, and site planning completed; meaningful infrastructure and site work already finished
listings.description: Shovel-ready campground development in Northeast Alabama. Infrastructure completion includes extended road access, connected municipal water, electric service installation, and dual septic systems. Features a portion of the Pisgah Gorge and Lower Pisgah Falls with an on-site ~50-foot waterfall serving as an amenity. Driving distance of Huntsville, Chattanooga, Birmingham, Atlanta, and Nashville. Development approvals and zoning finalized, enabling a new owner to move directly into vertical development and phased execution. Supports future expansion and diversified accommodation types, providing long-term development flexibility.

listings.title: Bakersfield KOA Journey
listings.condition_hint: Modern and immaculately maintained; built in 2007
listings.description: Modern and immaculately maintained 187-space KOA Journey, located on 15.48 acres on an infill location in Bakersfield, CA. All 187 RV sites are full-service with 50/30 amp hookups. Infill location on S Wible Road with 1,050' frontage, across from Bakersfield Auto Mall and adjacent to Interstate 99. Built in 2007 with municipal utilities. Office/restaurant building: ±6,700 SF (includes 3,800 SF restaurant). Recreation building: ±3,600 SF. Pool house: 2,658 SF. Amenities: on-site restaurant, clubhouse, pool/hot tub, playground, gym, dog park, upgraded Wi-Fi. Infrastructure: asphalt roads, cement curbs, gravel sites with cement patios.

listings.title: Northland Outfitters
listings.revenue_hint: Active revenue-generating business; multiple income sources from cabin rentals, campsite rentals, kayak/canoe livery, gear sales, and ancillary offerings; highly rated on Hipcamp
listings.description: 17-Unit Outdoor Resort on the Banks of the Manistique River, Providing Convenient Access to the Beautiful Upper Peninsula of Michigan. Multiple income sources from cabin rentals, campsite rentals, kayak/canoe livery, gear sales, and ancillary offerings. Riverfront location on Manistique River with mature trees. Features Benny the Beard Fisher Troll sculpture as on-site attraction. Active revenue-generating business with growth potential through marketing and expanded offerings. Highly rated on Hipcamp with praise for grounds and hospitality. Upper Peninsula location enables year-round operations.

listings.title: 4 Guys RV Park
listings.revenue_hint: Diversified revenue: RV and cabin rentals, restaurant lease income, cell tower, golf cart rentals, retail store, ancillary sales
listings.description: 81-site RV park spanning approximately 70 acres located in the Red River Gorge of Kentucky. 74 full-hookup RV sites complemented by vintage camper rentals, tiny homes, poolside homes, and barn houses. Amenities include a camp store, outdoor pool, fishing pond and creek access, multiple sports courts, and two playgrounds. A leased restaurant operates on-site under third-party management. Property generates diversified revenue through RV and cabin rentals, restaurant lease income, a cell tower, golf cart rentals, retail store operations, and ancillary sales. Approximately 65 wooded acres remain available for expansion without planning or zoning restrictions. Location offers convenient access to Lexington, Louisville, and Cincinnati, with adjacent retail development at Mushroom Grove shopping village.

listings.title: The Cove RV Resort
listings.revenue_hint: 198 kW solar array reducing electricity costs
listings.condition_hint: Under Contract; land lease with Riverside County Regional Park and Recreation District
listings.description: Full-service RV park located on the banks of the Colorado River. Guests enjoy waterfront amenities including a boat ramp, pool/spa, playground and more. 21.3 acres with 157 RV sites plus 6 park models to accommodate every type of traveler. Paved boat dock and small lagoon area on the river. Amenities: pool, store, laundry, storage area for boats/jet skis. Land lease with Riverside County Regional Park and Recreation District. 198 kW solar array reducing electricity costs.

listings.title: Hidden Valley RV Park
listings.revenue_hint: Existing 82 site RV park serving mostly long-term monthly-rate guests
listings.condition_hint: Under Contract; Class B with recent upgrades to infrastructure, amenities, and concrete pad sites
listings.description: 238-acre MH and RV park development property including an existing 82 site RV park + 150 space shovel-ready expansion + 800 space entitled MH or RV future expansion. All located within an opportunity zone. Existing RV park serves mostly long-term monthly-rate guests; infrastructure recently upgraded with new concrete pad sites. Entire property annexed into San Antonio with city water/sewer access. Phase 1 expansion fully engineered and city-approved. Additional 800 spaces already entitled. Situated 13 miles from downtown San Antonio with I-35 access 1.5 miles away.
listings.property_type: RV and Mobile Home Park Development

extraction.notes: Playwright MCP browser was locked by another active session; extraction performed via WebFetch HTTP fallback. All 22 listings extracted with full detail-page descriptions. 2 of 22 listings are unpriced (HTR Black Hills, Deer Point Meadows portfolio), reducing confidence from 1.0 to 0.7. No pagination — single index page. 3 listings marked Under Contract (4 Guys RV Park, The Cove RV Resort, Hidden Valley RV Park) — included per extract-everything policy.
